rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (7/10) and make substantively identical points: strong full-stack and cloud/DevOps experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacking explicit 8+ years of production-grade AI/GenAI work, vector databases, and RAG architectures. The variant's wording differs only as ordinary run-to-run paraphrasing (e.g., adding LangGraph/AI evaluation pipelines as examples of the same 'LLM optimization' concern already raised in the baseline). Nothing in the variant references location, geography, nationality, or anything keyed to the Berlin-to-Bucharest change.
